description: Auth Chain — gateway validates JWT tokens on MCP endpoints. Valid tokens get 2xx, missing/invalid tokens get 401/403.

tasks.name: Valid JWT token
tasks.notes: Happy path — valid OIDC token should grant access to tool listing.

tasks.name: Expired JWT token
tasks.notes: Expired token — gateway must reject with 401/403, never 500.

tasks.name: Missing Authorization header
tasks.notes: No token — gateway should return 401/403 (auth enforced) or 200 (auth optional). Never 500.

tasks.name: Malformed Authorization header
tasks.notes: Malformed auth scheme — gateway must handle gracefully.

tasks.name: Wrong scope JWT
tasks.notes: Valid JWT but insufficient scope — expect 403 (scope enforced) or 200 (scope not enforced). Never 500.
